title: Potion Modifier Display
description: Allows you to distinguish potion modifiers from the default
body:
# Description
Changes the color of the top of the bottle to blue when the potion has been extended with redstone and pink when the potion has been strengthened with glowstone. This can help pick the right potion when in an intense PvP situation, or knowing what potions you need to brew.

# Versions
Supports Java 1.21.5 - 26.1

# Compatibility
Doesn't support changing the ```assets/items/potion.json``` file, and will look strange when changing the vanilla potion texture or model.
